# Repositories and conventions

::: {.callout-tip}
## README template
Use the [template README](https://github.com/ClimChange-NewbornHealth/Lineamientos_colaboradores/blob/main/Plantilla_README.md) as a checklist before the first public release.
:::

## Common requirements (summary)

From [Lineamientos_colaboradores](https://github.com/ClimChange-NewbornHealth/Lineamientos_colaboradores):

- **Short names**, preferably **English**.
- **Public** repositories unless a contract explicitly forbids it.
- Required files: `README.md`, `.gitignore`, license — **MIT** recommended.
- Short GitHub description with scientific context.

## Standard layout

```
Code/
  Process/
  Descriptive/
  Models/
Output_Analysis/
  Graphs/
  Tables/
.gitignore
README.md
LICENSE
```

## README essentials

Based on the org template:

1. **Title** — ideally the paper or product title.
2. **Metrics / funding** — ANID, FONDECYT, IUP, etc.
3. **Authors + active maintainer** — email for contact.
4. **Scientific description** — background, aims, methods (abstract is enough to start).
5. **Data** — external link + **script execution order**.
6. **Main results** — numbered figures/tables with short notes.

## Examples

- [CIIIA-ClimateBirthWeightAnalysis](https://github.com/ClimChange-NewbornHealth/CIIIA-ClimateBirthWeightAnalysis)

| Repo | Role |
| --- | --- |
| [HeatWave_PretermBirth_Chile](https://github.com/ClimChange-NewbornHealth/HeatWave_PretermBirth_Chile) | Heat waves & prematurity |
| [Pollution_Kriging](https://github.com/ClimChange-NewbornHealth/Pollution_Kriging) | SINCA pollution surfaces |
| [Imputation_ClimData24](https://github.com/ClimChange-NewbornHealth/Imputation_ClimData24) | Climate gaps imputation |

More: [organization repositories](https://github.com/orgs/ClimChange-NewbornHealth/repositories).
